entries.final_answer: fail-closed-preflight: keep the 4-file content-hash; when references.yaml is absent surface a single actionable 'run charter generate first' preflight instead of a dead-end None. Leaves #2773's references.yaml deprecation clean (no stopgap). No dual-edit, no manifest derived-set change.
entries.question: How should #2758 fix the references.yaml permanent-stale (references.yaml is in the 4-file content-hash but sync never writes it)?
